title: Sprint Planning - Q3
attendees: Alice Chen, Bob Smith, Carol Davis
notes: Reviewed backlog items for Sprint 12. Committed to 8 story points. Key focus: user authentication module and dashboard redesign.

title: Design Review
attendees: Bob Smith, Elena Foster, Frank Garcia
notes: Walked through new component library. Elena will update the style guide by Friday. Frank raised concerns about accessibility on mobile.

title: Weekly Standup
attendees: Alice Chen, Bob Smith, Carol Davis, David Harris
notes: Quick sync on current sprint progress. All tasks on track. David mentioned a blocker with the API integration.

title: Retrospective - Sprint 11
attendees: Alice Chen, Bob Smith, Carol Davis, Elena Foster
notes: What went well: improved code review process. What to improve: better estimation on frontend tasks. Action: Carol to create estimation guidelines.

title: Product Roadmap Review
attendees: Alice Chen, Grace Kim, Hector Lopez
notes: Reviewed Q3 roadmap priorities. Mobile app feature moved to Q4. Focus remains on platform stability and performance.

title: Technical Architecture Discussion
attendees: Bob Smith, David Harris, Frank Garcia
notes: Evaluated microservices vs monolith for the new payment module. Decision: start monolithic, extract services when load justifies it.
